results.overview: Set in the 22nd century, The Matrix tells the story of a computer hacker who joins a group of underground insurgents fighting the vast and powerful computers who now rule the earth.
results.title: The Matrix

results.overview: A large electronics store welcomes vendors and customers. Cameras are there to show that the company’s slogans are not lies. A manipulation transforms the recordings and instils doubt.
results.title: The Matrix

results.overview: The Resistance builds in numbers as humans are freed from the Matrix and brought to the city of Zion. Neo discovers his superpowers, including the ability to see the code inside the Matrix. With machine sentinels digging to Zion in 72 hours, Neo, Morpheus and Trinity must find the Keymaker to ultimately reach the Source.
results.title: The Matrix Reloaded

results.overview: The human city of Zion defends itself against the massive invasion of the machines as Neo fights to end the war at another front while also opposing the rogue Agent Smith.
results.title: The Matrix Revolutions

results.overview: Plagued by strange memories, Neo's life takes an unexpected turn when he finds himself back inside the Matrix.
results.title: The Matrix Resurrections

results.overview: After the 1999 premiere of the first Matrix movie, it became a pop culture phenomenon. A special documentary about the Matrix saga and its prophetic aspects.
results.title: The Matrix: Generation

results.overview: The film goes behind the scenes of the 1999 sci-fi movie The Matrix.
results.title: The Matrix Revisited

results.overview: The making of Matrix Revolutions, The (2003) is briefly touched on here in this documentary. Interviews with various cast and crew members inform us how they were affected by the deaths of Gloria Foster and Aaliyah, and also delve into the making of the visual effects that takes up a lot of screen time. Written by Rhyl Donnelly
results.title: The Matrix Recalibrated

results.overview: A promotional making-of documentary for the film The Matrix (1999) that devotes its time to explaining the digital and practical effects contained in the film. This is very interesting, seeing as how they're giving away the cinematic secrets that they created solely for the this movie, that have now been spoofed and referenced in countless other films.
results.title: Making "The Matrix"

results.overview: "A Matriz" is a short documentary about Praça da Matriz, an important square in Porto Alegre. Through images, stories, and reflections, it explores the place’s history, architecture, and role in everyday life.
results.title: The Matrix

results.original_title: The Matrix Revolutions: Super Big Mini Models
results.overview: This making-of piece includes remarks from production designer Owen Paterson, concept artist George Hull, visual effects supervisor John Gaeta, US unit production manager L. Dean Jones Jr., US model unit special effects coordinator Geoffrey Heron, Zion unit sequence lead Rodney Iwashina, high speed first assistant camera Paul Sanchez, US model unit art director Nanci Noblett, conceptual designer Geofrey Darrow, model shop supervisor Michael Lynch, US model unit producer David Dranitzke, prop maker foremen Dave Fogler and Fon Davis, and visual effects supervisor John "DJ" Des Jardin.
results.title: The Matrix Revolutions: Super Big Mini Models

results.overview: The making of The Matrix Reloaded:  Go to the middle movie's furthest reaches via five documentary paths revealing 21 featurettes.
results.title: The Matrix Reloaded Revisited

results.overview: A new instalment in the franchise. Plot TBA.
results.title: The Matrix 5

results.overview: A spoof created for the 2000 MTV Movie Awards, combining The Matrix and "Sex in the City".
results.title: Sex and the Matrix

results.overview: In the Absheron region of the Krasnodar Territory, among the majestic Caucasus Mountains and impenetrable forests, small villages were lost. They are connected to the rest of the world only by a thin thread of a narrow gauge railway winding through the gorges - and this is the only way from there and the only way there. A small old trolley - a motor-car, nicknamed by the locals "Matrix", delivers food, fuel and other benefits of civilization every day. People who, for one reason or another, prefer loneliness and unity with nature to noisy city life, make their journey on it.
results.title: Exit The Matrix

results.name: Escape The Matrix
results.overview: You cannot escape the matrix unless you know you are in it. Join David Icke as he unravels the nature of the reality that we have been taught to believe is truth, through a lifetime of deep programming.
The making of The Matrix Revolutions:  The cataclysmic final confrontation chronicled through six documentary pods revealing 28 featurettes
results.title: The Matrix Revolutions Revisited

results.overview: A look at Enter the Matrix: The game's story picks up just before The Matrix Reloaded and runs parallel to that of the film. Bend the rules of the Matrix with martial arts, pilot the fastest hovercraft in the fleet, or just fight with lots of guns.
results.title: Making 'Enter the Matrix'

results.overview: This making-of piece offers the standard mix of movie snippets, behind the scenes materials, and interviews from cast and crew on the making of the film.
results.title: The Matrix Reloaded: Pre-Load

results.overview: Explores the various ways humanity is striving to find salvation. Take a journey through the various religions of the world and you will look at your life with a clearer vision.
results.title: The Religion Matrix
